title: acinodendron bracteatum
intro: Acinodendron bracteatum, also known as the Bracteatum acinodendron or Red salvia, is a plant species in the genus Acinodendron, native to Mexico and Central America. It is a flowering plant known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Acinodendron bracteatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
